results.classOfGoodServiceBusinessName: The mark consists of the words "AFRIKAN KING" written in capital letters in stylized font on the maps of Africa as a background. Above the text and design of Africa, there is a crown.

The mark consists of the terms "THE GOOD DISH" in stylized lettering with the term "THE" centered above the term "GOOD", which is centered above "DISH", and with the terms inside of a broken circle comprised of a curved line above "THE GOOD" and a curved line below "DISH".

The mark consists of the wording "CAROLINA KINGS" in capital letters on top of the state maps of South and North Carolina, with each of the states' flags overlaid on each states. At the top right is a silhouette of a mackerel fish.
